reading-time.name: Contract Reading Time Calculator
reading-time.description: Paste your contract text and get an estimated reading time based on word count and legal complexity. Helps you plan how long it will take to review a document.
reading-time.shortDescription: Estimate how long it takes to read a contract.

word-counter.name: Contract Word Counter
word-counter.description: Get detailed statistics about your contract including word count, character count, sentence count, paragraph count, and estimated pages.
word-counter.shortDescription: Get detailed word and character statistics.

jargon-translator.name: Legal Jargon Translator
jargon-translator.description: Look up common legal terms and get plain-English explanations. Search our dictionary of 100+ legal terms to understand what your contract actually says.
jargon-translator.shortDescription: Translate legal terms to plain English.

clause-finder.name: Contract Clause Finder
clause-finder.description: Paste your contract and search for common clause types like indemnification, termination, non-compete, confidentiality, and more. Quickly find the sections that matter most.
clause-finder.shortDescription: Find specific clauses in your contracts.

cancellation-deadline.name: Cancellation Deadline Calculator
cancellation-deadline.description: Calculate your cancellation deadline based on your signup date and cooling-off period. Know exactly when your right to cancel expires.
cancellation-deadline.shortDescription: Calculate when your cancellation window closes.

notice-period.name: Notice Period Calculator
notice-period.description: Calculate your notice period end date based on your start date and notice terms. Works for employment, rental, and service agreements.
notice-period.shortDescription: Calculate when your notice period ends.

late-fee.name: Late Fee Calculator
late-fee.description: Calculate the total late fee on an overdue payment. Enter the principal amount, fee rate, and number of days late to see what you owe or are owed.
late-fee.shortDescription: Calculate late fees on overdue payments.

refund-checker.name: Refund Eligibility Checker
refund-checker.description: Answer a few simple questions about your purchase and situation to check if you might be eligible for a refund. Covers common consumer scenarios.
refund-checker.shortDescription: Check if you qualify for a refund.

non-compete.name: Non-Compete Duration Checker
non-compete.description: Enter your non-compete clause duration and state to see general enforceability information. Some states restrict or ban non-competes entirely.

freelance-rate.name: Freelance Rate Calculator
freelance-rate.description: Convert between hourly rates, project fees, and annual income. Factor in taxes, expenses, and billable hours to find your true freelance rate.
freelance-rate.shortDescription: Convert between hourly, project, and annual rates.

invoice-interest.name: Invoice Late Interest Calculator
invoice-interest.description: Calculate the interest owed on late invoice payments. Enter the invoice amount, interest rate, and days overdue to determine the total amount due.

nda-generator.name: NDA Template Generator
nda-generator.description: Generate a basic Non-Disclosure Agreement by filling out a simple form. Customize parties, duration, scope, and jurisdiction.
nda-generator.shortDescription: Generate a basic NDA from a form.

privacy-generator.name: Privacy Policy Generator
privacy-generator.description: Generate a privacy policy for your website or app. Answer questions about your data practices and get a formatted policy document.
privacy-generator.shortDescription: Create a privacy policy for your website.

complaint-generator.name: Complaint Letter Generator
complaint-generator.description: Generate a formal complaint letter. Fill in the details about your issue and get a professionally formatted letter ready to send.

tos-generator.name: Terms of Service Generator
tos-generator.description: Generate terms of service for your website or application. Covers user agreements, liability limitations, and standard legal provisions.
tos-generator.shortDescription: Create terms of service for your site.

red-flag-scanner.name: Contract Red Flag Scanner
red-flag-scanner.description: Paste your contract and let AI identify risky clauses, unfair terms, and potential legal issues with severity ratings and recommendations.
red-flag-scanner.shortDescription: AI scans contracts for risky clauses.

nda-fairness.name: NDA Fairness Score
nda-fairness.description: Paste an NDA and get a fairness score from 0-100, with a breakdown of strengths, concerns, and recommendations for negotiation.

lease-analyzer.name: Lease Agreement Analyzer
lease-analyzer.description: Paste your lease agreement and get a summary of key terms, hidden risks, and recommendations. Perfect for renters reviewing a new lease.

terms-summarizer.name: Terms & Conditions Summarizer
terms-summarizer.description: Paste any Terms & Conditions or legal document and get a plain-English summary organized by topic, with concerning sections highlighted.

contract-comparison.name: Contract Comparison Tool
contract-comparison.description: Paste two contracts side by side and get an AI-powered comparison highlighting key differences, changed terms, and which version favors which party.

clause-explainer.name: Clause Explainer
clause-explainer.description: Paste any legal clause and get a plain-English explanation, risk assessment, practical implications, and negotiation tips.

contract-expiration.name: Contract Expiration Tracker
contract-expiration.description: Enter your contract dates and track expirations in one place. See which contracts are expiring soon, active, or already expired.

signature-block.name: Signature Block Generator
signature-block.description: Generate properly formatted signature blocks for individuals, corporations, LLCs, and partnerships. Copy and paste into your contracts.

contract-checklist.name: Contract Checklist Generator
contract-checklist.description: Select your contract type and get a comprehensive review checklist. Track which items you've reviewed with an interactive progress bar.

amendment-drafter.name: Contract Amendment Drafter
amendment-drafter.description: Generate a basic contract amendment by filling in the original contract details and describing the changes. Creates a formatted amendment document.
amendment-drafter.shortDescription: Draft a contract amendment from a form.

contract-value.name: Contract Value Calculator
contract-value.description: Calculate the total value of a contract including renewals and annual escalation rates. See initial term value, renewal value, and monthly averages.
contract-value.shortDescription: Calculate total contract value with renewals.

warranty-tracker.name: Warranty Expiration Calculator
warranty-tracker.description: Track warranty expiration dates for your purchases. Enter product details and warranty length to see which warranties are still active.
warranty-tracker.shortDescription: Track warranty end dates for purchases.

statute-of-limitations.name: Statute of Limitations Lookup
statute-of-limitations.description: Look up the statute of limitations for common legal claims by state. Find out how long you have to file for contract disputes, personal injury, fraud, and more.
statute-of-limitations.shortDescription: Look up filing deadlines by state.

small-claims-limit.name: Small Claims Court Limit Checker
small-claims-limit.description: Check the maximum dollar amount you can sue for in small claims court in your state. Enter your claim amount to see if it qualifies.
small-claims-limit.shortDescription: Check small claims $ limits by state.

consumer-rights-quiz.name: Consumer Rights Quiz
consumer-rights-quiz.description: Test your knowledge of consumer protection rights with our interactive quiz. Learn about return policies, warranties, billing disputes, and more.

dispute-letter.name: Dispute Letter Generator
dispute-letter.description: Generate a formal dispute letter for billing errors, credit report inaccuracies, service complaints, or product issues. Includes relevant legal references.

salary-converter.name: Salary to Hourly Converter
salary-converter.description: Convert between annual salary and hourly rate. Factor in benefits overhead, hours per week, and weeks per year to see the true cost of employment.
salary-converter.shortDescription: Convert salary to hourly rate and back.

pto-calculator.name: PTO Calculator
pto-calculator.description: Calculate your accrued paid time off based on your accrual rate, employment tenure, and days already used. See remaining PTO in days and hours.

wrongful-termination.name: Wrongful Termination Checklist
wrongful-termination.description: Answer questions about your termination and get an assessment of potential wrongful termination indicators, including discrimination and retaliation flags.

minimum-wage.name: Minimum Wage Lookup
minimum-wage.description: Look up current federal and state minimum wage rates, including tipped minimum wage. Compare your state's rate to the federal minimum.
minimum-wage.shortDescription: Look up minimum wage by state.

employment-checklist.name: Employment Contract Checklist
employment-checklist.description: A comprehensive interactive checklist of everything to look for in an employment contract — compensation, benefits, restrictive covenants, termination terms, and more.

cease-desist.name: Cease and Desist Letter Generator
cease-desist.description: Generate a formal cease and desist letter for harassment, defamation, IP infringement, contract breach, or debt collection issues.
cease-desist.shortDescription: Generate C&D letters for common scenarios.

poa-generator.name: Power of Attorney Generator
poa-generator.description: Generate a basic Power of Attorney document. Choose between general, limited, durable, or financial POA with customizable terms and notarization block.

ic-agreement.name: Independent Contractor Agreement Generator
ic-agreement.description: Generate a comprehensive independent contractor agreement covering scope of work, compensation, IP rights, confidentiality, and termination terms.
ic-agreement.shortDescription: Generate an IC agreement from a form.

promissory-note.name: Promissory Note Generator
promissory-note.description: Generate a basic promissory note with customizable terms including principal amount, interest rate, payment schedule, and default provisions.

security-deposit.name: Security Deposit Calculator
security-deposit.description: Look up security deposit rules by state including maximum deposit amounts, interest requirements, and return deadlines after move-out.
security-deposit.shortDescription: Check security deposit rules by state.

rent-increase.name: Rent Increase Calculator
rent-increase.description: Calculate your rent increase percentage and annual impact. Check against rent control caps in major jurisdictions.
rent-increase.shortDescription: Check if a rent increase is legal.

lease-comparison.name: Lease Term Comparison
lease-comparison.description: Compare two lease offers side by side including rent, deposit, utilities, and total cost. See which lease gives you the best value.

moveout-checklist.name: Move-Out Checklist Generator
moveout-checklist.description: Generate a customized move-out checklist based on your property type and features. Track progress with an interactive checklist.

rental-agreement.name: Rental Agreement Generator
rental-agreement.description: Generate a basic residential lease agreement by filling in landlord, tenant, property, and financial details. Includes standard legal provisions.

business-name.name: Business Name Checker
business-name.description: Check your proposed business name for length, special characters, entity suffix, uniqueness, and domain potential. Includes trademark search tips.

contractor-vs-employee.name: Contractor vs. Employee Checker
contractor-vs-employee.description: Answer 10 questions based on IRS classification factors to determine if a worker is likely an employee or independent contractor.
contractor-vs-employee.shortDescription: Classify worker as employee or contractor.

severance-pay.name: Severance Pay Calculator
severance-pay.description: Estimate typical severance pay based on salary, years of service, and industry level. See low and high estimates for negotiation.

overtime-calc.name: Overtime Calculator
overtime-calc.description: Calculate overtime pay based on hourly rate, regular hours, overtime hours, and multiplier. See detailed pay breakdown and effective rate.

partnership-split.name: Partnership Split Calculator
partnership-split.description: Calculate suggested equity and profit splits for partnerships based on capital contributions, time commitments, and customizable weighting.

business-expense.name: Business Expense Tracker Template
business-expense.description: Generate a formatted expense tracking template customized for your business type. Includes relevant expense categories and IRS mileage rates.

crypto-tax.name: Crypto Tax Calculator
crypto-tax.description: Calculate capital gains or losses on cryptocurrency trades. Estimates short-term vs long-term tax based on your holding period and tax bracket.

dca-calculator.name: DCA Calculator
dca-calculator.description: Simulate a dollar-cost averaging strategy. See your average cost basis, total units acquired, and return based on regular periodic investments.

position-size.name: Position Size Calculator
position-size.description: Calculate the optimal position size based on your account size, risk tolerance, and stop loss distance. Essential for proper risk management.

profit-loss.name: Profit & Loss Calculator
profit-loss.description: Calculate your profit or loss on a trade including leverage and trading fees. See gross P&L, net P&L, and percentage return.

compound-interest.name: Compound Interest Calculator
compound-interest.description: Project the growth of your investment with compound interest. Factor in initial principal, interest rate, compounding frequency, and monthly contributions.

margin-call.name: Margin Call Calculator
margin-call.description: Determine at what price your broker will issue a margin call. Input your equity, borrowed amount, and maintenance margin requirement.
margin-call.shortDescription: Calculate your margin call trigger price.

breakeven-calc.name: Trade Breakeven Calculator
breakeven-calc.description: Calculate the exact breakeven price for a trade accounting for round-trip trading fees and leverage. Know the minimum move needed to profit.
breakeven-calc.shortDescription: Find your breakeven price after fees.

risk-reward.name: Risk/Reward Calculator
risk-reward.description: Analyze the risk-to-reward ratio of a trade. Input your entry, stop loss, and take profit to see if the trade is worth taking.

crypto-converter.name: Crypto Converter
crypto-converter.description: Convert between major cryptocurrencies using reference prices. See equivalent values across BTC, ETH, SOL, and other popular assets.

loan-payment.name: Loan Payment Calculator
loan-payment.description: Calculate monthly loan payments using standard amortization. See your monthly payment, total interest paid, and total cost of the loan.

grant-budget.name: Grant Budget Calculator
grant-budget.description: Allocate grant funds across budget categories like personnel, equipment, travel, and indirect costs. Track remaining funds and get warnings when allocations exceed the total grant amount.
grant-budget.shortDescription: Allocate and track grant budget spending.

grant-deadline.name: Grant Deadline Tracker
grant-deadline.description: Track grant application deadlines, reporting due dates, and milestones. See countdown timers, urgency badges, and a sorted timeline of all upcoming obligations.
grant-deadline.shortDescription: Track grant deadlines and reporting dates.

grant-compliance.name: Grant Compliance Checklist
grant-compliance.description: Generate a compliance checklist based on your grant type — federal, state, foundation, or corporate. Covers reporting, audits, procurement, matching funds, and record-keeping requirements.

vesting-schedule.name: Vesting Schedule Calculator
vesting-schedule.description: Calculate your equity vesting timeline based on total shares, vesting period, cliff, and frequency. See a detailed table of vested shares per period with cumulative totals.

stock-option-tax.name: Stock Option Tax Calculator
stock-option-tax.description: Estimate taxes on stock option exercises for ISOs and NSOs. Calculates ordinary income tax, capital gains tax, and AMT exposure based on your holding period and tax bracket.
stock-option-tax.shortDescription: Estimate taxes on stock option exercises.

equity-dilution.name: Equity Dilution Calculator
equity-dilution.description: Calculate how funding rounds and option pool expansions affect your ownership percentage. See pre- and post-dilution ownership side by side with the total dilution impact.
equity-dilution.shortDescription: Calculate equity dilution from funding rounds.

solar-roi.name: Solar Panel ROI Calculator
solar-roi.description: Calculate the return on investment for solar panel installation. Input system cost, energy production, electricity rate, and incentives to see payback period, 25-year savings, and ROI percentage.
solar-roi.shortDescription: Calculate solar panel payback period and ROI.

solar-incentive.name: Solar Incentive & Tax Credit Estimator
solar-incentive.description: Estimate federal and state solar incentives including the 30% Investment Tax Credit (ITC), state rebates, and SREC values. See your net cost after all available incentives.
solar-incentive.shortDescription: Estimate solar tax credits and state rebates.

energy-savings.name: Energy Savings Calculator
energy-savings.description: Calculate how much you can save on electricity by going solar. Input your current bill, solar coverage percentage, and system cost to see monthly, annual, and lifetime savings.
energy-savings.shortDescription: Calculate electricity savings from solar power.

carbon-footprint.name: Carbon Footprint Offset Calculator
carbon-footprint.description: Calculate the CO₂ emissions you can avoid by switching to renewable energy. See equivalents in trees planted and driving miles offset based on your energy source and usage.
carbon-footprint.shortDescription: Calculate CO₂ savings from switching to renewables.

green-lease.name: Green Lease Clause Checker
green-lease.description: Evaluate your commercial lease for green provisions. Check which sustainability clauses are present and get a score with recommendations for missing essential provisions.
green-lease.shortDescription: Check green clauses in commercial leases.

ev-vs-gas.name: EV vs Gas Cost Comparison
ev-vs-gas.description: Compare the annual fuel costs of driving an electric vehicle versus a gas vehicle. See side-by-side costs, annual savings, and 10-year projected savings.
ev-vs-gas.shortDescription: Compare EV and gas vehicle fuel costs.

home-energy-audit.name: Home Energy Audit Checklist
home-energy-audit.description: Generate a prioritized checklist of energy improvements for your home. Select your home type and age to see applicable upgrades with estimated savings ranges.
home-energy-audit.shortDescription: Get a personalized home energy improvement checklist.

ppa-calculator.name: Power Purchase Agreement Calculator
ppa-calculator.description: Compare the total cost of a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) versus utility electricity over the contract term. See year-by-year cost breakdowns including rate escalations.
ppa-calculator.shortDescription: Compare PPA costs vs utility electricity.

income-tax.name: Income Tax Estimator
income-tax.description: Estimate your federal income tax based on filing status, gross income, and deductions. See a bracket-by-bracket breakdown, effective tax rate, and take-home pay.
income-tax.shortDescription: Estimate federal income tax by bracket.

auto-loan.name: Auto Loan Calculator
auto-loan.description: Calculate your monthly auto loan payment including down payment and trade-in value. See total interest paid and the true cost of your vehicle purchase.

debt-payoff.name: Debt Payoff Calculator
debt-payoff.description: See how long it takes to pay off debt with minimum payments vs extra payments. Compare total interest paid and time saved by paying more each month.
debt-payoff.shortDescription: Calculate debt payoff time and interest savings.

net-worth.name: Net Worth Calculator
net-worth.description: Calculate your net worth by listing your assets and liabilities. Track cash, investments, property, and debts to see your overall financial position.

paycheck-calc.name: Paycheck Calculator
paycheck-calc.description: Estimate your take-home pay per paycheck. Enter salary or hourly rate, filing status, and pay frequency to see federal tax, Social Security, and Medicare withholdings.

settlement-estimator.name: Settlement Value Estimator
settlement-estimator.description: Estimate your personal injury or auto accident settlement value. Enter medical bills, lost wages, and injury severity to get a range based on the multiplier method.

insurance-quote-comparison.name: Insurance Quote Comparison Tool
insurance-quote-comparison.description: Compare auto, home, and life insurance quotes side by side. Enter quotes from multiple companies and see which offers the best value.
insurance-quote-comparison.shortDescription: Compare insurance quotes side by side.

accident-damage.name: Accident Damage Calculator
accident-damage.description: Calculate the total damages from an accident including medical bills, property damage, lost wages, and pain and suffering. See a complete breakdown.

attorney-fee.name: Attorney Fee Calculator
attorney-fee.description: Calculate attorney fees for contingency and hourly arrangements. See how much your lawyer will earn and what your take-home settlement will be.

insurance-premium.name: Insurance Premium Estimator
insurance-premium.description: Estimate monthly insurance premiums for auto, home, renters, and life insurance based on your age, credit, location, and coverage level.

force-majeure-checker.name: Force Majeure Clause Checker
force-majeure-checker.description: Paste your contract and instantly see whether the force majeure clause is strong, narrow, or missing. Detects covered events, catch-all language, notice requirements, and duty-to-mitigate clauses.
force-majeure-checker.shortDescription: Detect and rate force majeure clauses.

auto-renewal-detector.name: Auto-Renewal Clause Detector
auto-renewal-detector.description: Find evergreen and auto-renewal language in any contract. Surfaces the notice window so you don't miss a cancellation deadline.

governing-law-id.name: Governing Law Identifier
governing-law-id.description: Extract governing law, venue, arbitration, jury-trial waivers and class-action waivers from any contract in seconds.

plain-english-rewriter.name: Plain English Rewriter
plain-english-rewriter.description: Convert legalese into plain English. Replaces archaic legal phrases (heretofore, pursuant to, notwithstanding) with clear modern equivalents.

chargeback-checker.name: Chargeback Eligibility Checker
chargeback-checker.description: Answer a few questions to see whether you're likely eligible for a credit-card chargeback under the Fair Credit Billing Act.
chargeback-checker.shortDescription: Check if you can win a chargeback.

lemon-law-qualifier.name: Lemon Law Qualifier
lemon-law-qualifier.description: Check whether your defective vehicle likely qualifies under your state's lemon law based on repair attempts, days out of service, age, and mileage.
lemon-law-qualifier.shortDescription: Check if your vehicle qualifies as a lemon.

subscription-cancel-letter.name: Subscription Cancellation Letter
subscription-cancel-letter.description: Generate a written cancellation letter for any subscription (gym, SaaS, magazine) that requires written notice.

data-breach-checklist.name: Data Breach Response Checklist
data-breach-checklist.description: Step-by-step checklist for what to do after receiving a data-breach notification — from changing passwords to filing IRS Form 14039.
data-breach-checklist.shortDescription: Steps to take after a data breach.

final-paycheck-lookup.name: Final Paycheck Deadline Lookup
final-paycheck-lookup.description: When is your last paycheck legally due? Lookup by state for both termination and resignation scenarios.
final-paycheck-lookup.shortDescription: When your final paycheck is legally due.

unemployment-estimator.name: Unemployment Benefits Estimator
unemployment-estimator.description: Estimate your weekly unemployment benefit based on your prior wages and state cap.

nda-vs-noncompete.name: NDA vs. Non-Compete Comparator
nda-vs-noncompete.description: Side-by-side comparison of NDAs and non-competes — purpose, scope, duration, enforceability, and red flags.
nda-vs-noncompete.shortDescription: Compare NDAs and non-competes side by side.

discrimination-checklist.name: Workplace Discrimination Claim Checklist
discrimination-checklist.description: Prepare to file an EEOC charge — documentation, comparator analysis, internal reporting, and retaliation tracking.

eviction-notice-lookup.name: Eviction Notice Period Lookup
eviction-notice-lookup.description: Look up the legally required eviction notice period by state and reason — non-payment, lease violation, or no-fault termination.

habitability-tracker.name: Habitability Repair Request Generator
habitability-tracker.description: Generate a written repair request invoking the implied warranty of habitability — the foundation for rent withholding or repair-and-deduct remedies.
habitability-tracker.shortDescription: Generate a written habitability repair request.

mortgage-affordability.name: Mortgage Affordability Calculator
mortgage-affordability.description: Calculate your maximum home price using the 36% debt-to-income rule, accounting for taxes, insurance, and existing debts.
mortgage-affordability.shortDescription: Calculate your max affordable home price.

operating-agreement-llc.name: LLC Operating Agreement Generator
operating-agreement-llc.description: Generate a basic LLC operating agreement covering members, capital, profits, management, and dissolution.
operating-agreement-llc.shortDescription: Generate a basic LLC operating agreement.

founders-agreement.name: Founders Agreement Generator
founders-agreement.description: Draft a founders agreement covering equity splits, vesting (1-year cliff, 4-year), IP assignment, roles, and departure.
founders-agreement.shortDescription: Draft a founders agreement with vesting & IP.

dmca-generator.name: DMCA Takedown Notice Generator
dmca-generator.description: Generate a DMCA takedown notice that meets the 17 U.S.C. § 512(c) requirements for removing infringing content.

emergency-fund.name: Emergency Fund Calculator
emergency-fund.description: Calculate how much you need in an emergency fund and how long it will take to reach your goal at your current savings rate.

tip-splitter.name: Tip & Service Charge Splitter
tip-splitter.description: Split a restaurant bill across multiple people including tax and tip — with handling for mandatory service charges (which are not legally tips).
tip-splitter.shortDescription: Split bills with tax, tip, and service charges.

net-metering.name: Net Metering Savings Estimator
net-metering.description: Estimate annual savings from solar net metering — production offset plus credits for excess energy exported to the grid.

child-support.name: Child Support Calculator
child-support.description: Estimate monthly child support obligations using your state's income shares or percentage-of-income guideline. Supports California, New York, Texas, Florida, Illinois, and a generic fallback.
child-support.shortDescription: Estimate monthly child support by state.

alimony-calc.name: Alimony / Spousal Support Calculator
alimony-calc.description: Estimate monthly alimony (spousal support / maintenance) and likely duration based on incomes, length of marriage, and state guidelines.

divorce-cost.name: Divorce Cost Estimator
divorce-cost.description: Estimate the total cost of a divorce including filing fees, attorney hours, mediation, and court costs — for both contested and uncontested cases.
divorce-cost.shortDescription: Estimate the total cost of a divorce.

sol-deadline.name: Statute of Limitations Deadline Calculator
sol-deadline.description: Enter the date your claim arose and your state — get the exact filing deadline and how many days you have left to sue. Covers contracts, personal injury, fraud, and property damage.
sol-deadline.shortDescription: Find your exact filing deadline by date.

wrongful-term-value.name: Wrongful Termination Case Value Estimator
wrongful-term-value.description: Estimate the potential value of a wrongful termination claim including lost wages, lost benefits, emotional distress damages, and attorney fees.
wrongful-term-value.shortDescription: Estimate your wrongful termination case value.

severance-fairness.name: Severance Offer Fairness Score
severance-fairness.description: Score your severance offer 0–100 against industry benchmarks for your role, tenure, and salary level. Get a fairness rating and negotiation guidance.
severance-fairness.shortDescription: Score your severance offer against benchmarks.

lease-break-penalty.name: Lease Break / Early Termination Penalty Calculator
lease-break-penalty.description: Estimate the financial penalty for breaking your lease early — including months remaining, mitigation by your landlord, and state-specific caps on liability.
lease-break-penalty.shortDescription: Estimate the cost of breaking your lease.
